title: Warm Weeknight Mediterranean Juicy Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful low-fat-friendly lamb stew that's perfect for a weeknight dinner. This Mediterranean-inspired dish is easy to make and packed with juicy lamb, aromatics, and a hint of mustard.

ingredients.name: Dijon mustard
ingredients.notes: mix of Dijon and whole-grain mustard

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes, then transfer to a plate.
Add shallots and soffritto to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb back to the skillet, along with the parsley, lemon juice, mustard, salt, and pepper.
Transfer the mixture to small ceramic mini-cocottes or ramekins.
Cover with foil and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes or until the lamb is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
